briefdescription.para: ROM version 1.
SHA0 mask.
SHA1 mask.
AES mask.
SHA0 DMA0.
SHA0 DMA1.
SHA1 DMA0.
SHA1 DMA1.
AES DMA0.
AES DMA1.
LPD initialized version.
LPD initialized LC version.
UART base address version.
UART base address LC version.
Trace log version.
Trace log LC version.
Board parameters version.
Board parameters LC version.
IOModule version.
IOModule LC version.
Voltage multiplier for Sysmon.
PPU buffers Data structure version.
PPU buffers Data structure LC version.
PMC buffers Data structure version.
PMC buffers Data structure LC version.
PPU buffer list Data structure version.
PPU buffer list Data structure LC version.
PMC buffer list Data structure version.
PMC buffer list Data structure LC version.
This function converts voltage to raw voltage value.

parameterdescription.para: is the floating point voltage value

briefdescription.para: This function will disable and clear the IOmodule interrupts.
This function provides handler for HW interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is presently the interrupt number that is received

briefdescription.para: This function returns the current enabled interrupt mask of IOmodule.
This function enables the IOModule interrupts with provided value.

parameterdescription.para: to be written to the IER register of IOModule

briefdescription.para: This function monitors the KAT status and updates the FIPS state in RTCA.
This function provides pointer to g_TopLevelInterruptTable.
This function provides size of g_TopLevelInterruptTable.
This function provides pointer to BoardParams.
This function provides pointer to IOModule structure.
This function provides LpdInitialized variable pointer.
This function provides LpdInitialized variable pointer.

detaileddescription.para: This function provides a pointer to the UART base address variable.

simplesect.para: Pointer to the static UartBaseAddr variable that stores the UART base address (initialized to XPLMI_INVALID_UART_BASE_ADDR)

briefdescription.para: This function performs plmi pre-initializaton.
This function performs initialization of platform specific RCTA registers.

inbodydescription.para: If XPAR_PSU_PSS_REF_CLK_FREQ_HZ is present in the design, it means that the reference clock frequency is known and can be stored in RTCA during initialization. If it's not defined, store 0 to indicate unknown reference clock frequency.

briefdescription.para: This function prints ROM version using ROM digest value.
This function masks the secure stream switch value.

parameterdescription.para: - DMA0 or DMA1
DMA0 or DMA1.

briefdescription.para: This function provides TraceLog instance.
This function is used for shutdown operation before In-place PLM Update.

parameterdescription.para: is the operation information

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and XST_FAILURE on failure

briefdescription.para: This function processes and provides SrcAddr and DestAddr for cfi readback.

parameterdescription.para: is the type of Slr passed in readback cmd
is the pointer to the SrcAddr variable
is the pointer to the DestAddrRead variable
is the type of Slr passed in readback cmd.
is the pointer to the SrcAddr variable.
is the pointer to the DestAddrRead variable.

briefdescription.para: This will add the GIC interrupt task handler to the TaskQueue.

parameterdescription.para: is the GIC interrupt ID of the task
is the GIC interrupt ID of the task.

briefdescription.para: This function is the IPI interrupt handler for the device.

detaileddescription.para: This function is the Ipi interrupt handler for the device.

parameterdescription.para: is a dummy argument

briefdescription.para: This function registers and enables IPI interrupt.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and XST_FAILURE on failure

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and XST_FAILURE on failure

briefdescription.para: This function registers and enables IPI interrupt.
This function provides the Iro Frequency used in ROM.
This function provides check if its Mp or hp part.

simplesect.para:
- returns TRUE for voltage > 0.775v
FALSE otherwise

briefdescription.para: It sets the PMC IRO frequency.

detaileddescription.para: This functions sets the PMC IRO frequency.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code failure

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS on success
XST_FAILURE on failure

inbodydescription.para: During PLM phase, set PMC IRO frequency to 400MHz for MP,HP parts Added redundancy to make it single glitch immune
Update PPU1 MB frequency used in BSP for timing calculations
During PLM phase, set PMC IRO frequency to 400MHz for MP,HP parts if production sample and for HP parts if ES1. Added redundancy to make it single glitch immune
Update PPU1 MB frequency used in BSP for timing calculations

briefdescription.para: This function is used to check and wait for DMA done when sending data to SSIT Slave SLRs.

detaileddescription.para: This function is used to check and wait for DMA done.

parameterdescription.para: holds the address of the destination buffer

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: is the address of destination

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: holds the address of the destination buffer.

briefdescription.para: This function provides Gic interrupt id.

parameterdescription.para: indicates GICP source
indicates GICPx source
indicates GICP source
indicates GICPx source
indicates GICP source.
indicates GICPx source.

briefdescription.para: This function provides IPI interrupt id.

parameterdescription.para: is the Ipi target buffer index
is the Ipi target buffer index.

briefdescription.para: This function raises an interrupt request to ROM and waits for completion.

detaileddescription.para: Before calling this API all pre-requsites for ROM service shall be completed.

parameterdescription.para: variable of enum type XPlmi_RomIntr

listitem.para: XPLMI_ERR_INVALID_ROM_INT_REQ on invalid interrupt request for ROM.

briefdescription.para: This function return FIPS mode.

simplesect.para: TRUE If FIPS mode is enabled FALSE If FIPS mode is disabled

briefdescription.para: This function returns ROM KAT status.
This function returns KAT status from RCTA area.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets KAT status from RTC area.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the variable which holds kat status
is the pointer to the variable which holds kat status.

briefdescription.para: This function clears SSS Cfg error set during ROM PCR Extension.
This function returns XPlmi_FipsKatMask instance.
This function checks and updates the FIPS state in RTCA.
This function sets or clears crypto bit in RTCA based on mask.

parameterdescription.para: Mask to set or clear crypto status
Value to set or clear crypto status

briefdescription.para: This function returns crypto status flag.

parameterdescription.para: Mask to read crypto status

briefdescription.para: This function will return KAT status of given mask.

parameterdescription.para: contains the KAT mask

simplesect.para: TRUE If KAT ran FALSE If KAT didn't ran

parameterdescription.para: contains the KAT mask

briefdescription.para: This function defines BufferList and returns the address of the same.

parameterdescription.para: is the proc list type if it is stored in PMC or PSM RAM

simplesect.para: BufferList is the address of BufferList structure

parameterdescription.para: is the proc list type if it is stored in PMC or PPU RAM

simplesect.para: BufferList is the address of BufferList structure

parameterdescription.para: is the proc list type if it is stored in PMC or PSM RAM.

listitem.para: BufferList is the address of BufferList structure.
Create static BufferList structure and initialize with zero during initial call.
Initialize first Data address of the PmcBufferList to the PMC RAM reserved address and BufferMemSize with the Max Size allocated
Create static BufferList structure and initialize with zero during initial call.
Initialize first Data address of the PmcBufferList to the PMC RAM reserved address and BufferMemSize with the Max Size allocated
Create static BufferList structure and initialize with zero during initial call.
Initialize first Data address of the PmcBufferList to the PMC RAM reserved address and BufferMemSize with the Max Size allocated
Create static BufferList structure and initialize with zero during initial call.
Initialize first Data address of the PmcBufferList to the PMC RAM reserved address and BufferMemSize with the Max Size allocated
Create static BufferList structure and initialize with zero during initial call.
Initialize first Data address of the PmcBufferList to the PMC RAM reserved address and BufferMemSize with the Max Size allocated
